_comment: Synthetic /library entries used as the acceptance oracle for spec 045 US1 (stateful workflow strip). Each fixture describes the four booleans that drive applyStripState(entry) and the expected data-state per step. See tests/ui/strip_states_README.md for the expected outputs.

fixtures.name: fresh_upload_no_analysis
fixtures.description: MP3 uploaded but analysis has not run yet.

fixtures.name: analyzed_no_story_layout_ok
fixtures.description: Song analyzed, no story yet, layout configured.

fixtures.name: analyzed_with_story_never_generated
fixtures.description: Analyzed and story present; never generated yet; layout configured — step 4 (Generate) is active.

fixtures.name: fully_generated
fixtures.description: Analyzed, story present, generation recorded, layout configured — every step complete.

fixtures.name: layout_missing_blocks_generate
fixtures.description: Song fully briefed but no layout configured — step 4 (Generate) is blocked.
